title: Arch Flora
description: Adds flowers, plants, bushes, mushrooms and more
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/997138383132426261/1070734817391562832/Arch_Bows_copy.png)



 --- ### ***About Arch Flora*** Arch Flora is a small mod that aims to add some flora to Minecraft. It does this by adding some more flowers, plants, scrubs, bushes, mushrooms etc, to the world. The main focus is to give the player variety in flora when exploring each dimension. Some of the flora can only be found in specific biomes.  --- ### ***About Mushrooms & Fungi*** Certain mushrooms and fungi have different size & color/pattern varients. The size is random each time a mushroom or fungus grow natural or with bonemeal. The color/pattern depends on the block it grows on. All mushrooms and fungi are usable in certain recipes like rabbit stew or certain recipes in Farmers Delight. ![Alt text](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/997138383132426261/1071780254328311838/flora.png) ![Alt text](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/997138383132426261/1071796636289859664/flora3.png)  --- ### ***About Plants & Bushes*** Certain plants and bushes change there color depending on the biome they spawn in. Plants have the same color properties as grass while bushes the same color properties as leaves. ![Alt text](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/997138383132426261/1071798331984064584/flora2.png)  --- ### ***Features Planned*** - More flora  --- ### ***Mod compatibility*** - JEI - Serene Seasons - Config file for customization It works with biome and worldgen mods.  --- ### ***FAQ*** **Q: Can I use your mod in my modpack?** A: Absolutely!   **Q: Will you update the mod with content/update to the newer versions?** A: Yes.    **Q: Backport to older versions?** A: No, it is better that I focus on the newer versions.   **Q: I've seen your mod on other sites. Did you post it and are they safe?** A: I have not, nor do I plan to, post my mod on any other sites than Curseforge or Modrinth. If you have downloaded my mod from somewhere else, 1. It isn't from me and 2. It may have some kind of malicious files or have been modified in some way. I urge you to delete the file, run a full virus and malware scan and, if you want to use Arch Bows, come and download it on CurseForge or Modrinth.   **Q. Fabric?** A. Nope. Maybe in the future if I have more time
